title.en: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
title.th: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem

summary.en: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
summary.th: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
